name: pnp-list-formatting-credit-card
title: Credit / Loyalty Card
shortDescription: Transforms list items into realistic credit / loyalty cards with a brand name, tier pill, EMV chip, contactless symbol, embossed card number, cardholder, expiry, and network logo. The card colour is driven by the Tier value.
longDescription: This SharePoint JSON view formatting sample transforms list items into realistic credit / loyalty cards. Each item renders as a plastic card with a brand name, tier pill, EMV chip, contactless symbol, embossed-style card number, cardholder name, expiry date, and a network logo. The card colour automatically adapts to the Tier value (Standard, Gold, Platinum, Black, Premium) by reading a column-driven TierColor value, so each card can be styled independently.

references.name: Use view formatting to customize SharePoint
references.description: You can use view formatting to customize how items in SharePoint lists and libraries are displayed. To do this, you construct a JSON object that describes the elements that are displayed when an item is loaded in a view and any styles to be applied to those elements.
